title: rubus × philyrophyllus
intro: Rubus × philyrophyllus, also known as the raspberry-leaved blackberry, is a hybrid of the Rubus genus, specifically a cross between the raspberry and blackberry species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus × philyrophyllus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used to make jams, jellies, and other culinary products.
